summary: Wire MetaKBReader into LearningEngine.advise() method. Advice output now includes meta_context field with warnings, suggestions, and conventions from the meta-knowledge index. Fail-open: returns empty arrays if index unavailable. Adds meta_context_stale flag when index > 24h old. 6 integration tests.
root_cause: LearningEngine.advise() had no access to the meta-knowledge index. OrchestrationAdvisor decisions were made without consulting the 161 learning-updates or AGENTS.md anti-patterns/conventions.
fix_approach: Added MetaKBReader require and initialization in LearningEngine constructor. In advise(), query meta-KB after advisor generates advice, attach meta_context to response. Set meta_context_stale flag when index is outdated. Export MetaKBReader from package.

validation.notes: 6 integration tests pass. Full bun test suite exit code 0. Backward compatible: advise() output is additive (new field only).
